name: X's Spinach Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 bunches spinach, washed, drained, stems removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the dressing first: blend together sugar, safflower oil, mustard, and salt. Add vinegar, celery seeds, and grated onion; shake or beat well. Chill.
2. Mix together all salad ingredients except asparagus spears. Pour chilled dressing over all and toss until well coated.
3. Arrange asparagus spears on top.
4. Chill thoroughly before serving. It is best the next day.
